title: Product Manager, Growth - Google Pay
tip_to_score: This role directly aligns with your 5+ years in Product Growth. Lead with your 2.3% revenue uplift story from Meta Reels monetization and your experience scaling ByteDance TikTok Shop for SMBs. Emphasize your cross-functional leadership across engineering, design, and data science teams.

title: Strategy & Operations Manager, Google Cloud India
tip_to_score: Leverage your ByteDance experience managing the Indian market expansion and your startup co-founding story to demonstrate market strategy chops. Your GenZ audience expertise and non-technical PM background are differentiators for this ops-heavy role.
